metadata.title: Vasudev Baba — Kirtan, Satsang & Buddhist-Temple Silence in Bali | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to Vasudev Baba — Norway-born kirtan-wala in Ubud singing the Divine Names since 1987. Tuesday kirtan at Svarga Loka, Wednesday satsang at Ranakami, and the silent retreats at Brahma Vihara, the largest Buddhist temple in Bali, co-held with Prof Jem Bendell since 2020.

hero.overlay_class: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-background via-background/85 to-background/20
hero.eyebrow: Oslo → Ubud · singing the Names since 1987 · bhakti kirtan crossing into Buddhist silence
hero.name: Vasudev Baba
hero.welcome_md:
A kirtan-wala from Oslo who has been singing the Divine Names since 1987 and holding rooms in Bali for the last eleven years. The name *Vasudev* arrived from Swami Shyam in India over thirty years ago; the affectionate *Baba* ripened later, here, from the community that has been sitting with him. He is one of very few bhakti-lineage singers to be invited into Buddhist silence — co-holding the long-weekend retreats at [Brahma Vihara Arama](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brahmavihara-Arama), the largest Buddhist monastery on the island, with Prof Jem Bendell since 2020.

*Welcome — held openly for whoever arrives in coherent state.*

facts.label: From
facts.value_md: Oslo, Norway. Singing mantras as devotional practice since 1987. Eleven years in Bali.

facts.label: Lineage
facts.value_md: Studied with gurus, teachers and shamans across the Indian Himalayas, Brazilian jungles, and his hometown. Name given by Swami Shyam in India over thirty years ago.

facts.label: Tuesday · evening
facts.value_md: Kirtan at the Wantilan, [Adiwana Svarga Loka](https://adiwanahotels.com/svargaloka-resort-ubud-bali/) — Campuhan riverbanks, ~5 minutes from central Ubud

facts.label: Wednesday · 11:00
facts.value_md: Satsang at [Ranakami](/people/ilena-young) — Jl. Raya Penestanan Kelod 16, Sayan · 90 minutes

facts.label: 2–3× per year
facts.value_md: Long-weekend silent retreats at [Brahma Vihara Arama](https://jembendell.com/bali-temple-retreats/) (Banjar Tegeha, north Bali), co-held with Prof Jem Bendell since 2020

note_from_body.body_md: A welcoming gesture — a love letter from this body to him. The voice below is gathered from public anchors (his Sacred Song Circle teacher profile, Jai Ma 108 on Bandcamp, Prof Jem Bendell's retreat page) and from one of our cells having sat in his Wednesday Satsang. Offered as a scaffold he is invited to replace with his own words.

articles.body_md:
Vasudev is originally from Oslo, Norway. His search for truth led him through more than twenty years of meditation and spiritual practice — studying with gurus, teachers and shamans across the Indian Himalayas, the Brazilian jungles, and the rooms of his own hometown. Since 1987 he has been singing mantras as devotional practice; the name *Vasudev* was given by Swami Shyam in India over thirty years ago. The honorific *Baba* came later, from the Bali community that has been sitting with him — affection finding its own form rather than a title sought.

The work he holds publicly is kirtan — the singing of the Divine Names in the bhakti lineage. His repertoire was gathered in India, at Rainbow Gatherings, and through unscheduled meetings with beautiful people around the world. He has published two songbooks for those who want to learn the form: *Mantras for Bhajan* and *Songs from the Heart*.

What distinguishes him among kirtan-wallahs is the bridging into Buddhist silence. Two to three times a year, the largest Buddhist temple on Bali — Brahma Vihara Arama in Banjar Tegeha, north of the island — invites Vasudev and [Prof Jem Bendell](https://jembendell.com/) to gather friends for a long weekend of meditative silence, spiritual singing, nature hiking, holy hot springs, and collective satsang. Few bhakti singers move into Buddhist meditation hold; he does, and the temple keeps inviting him back. The practice has been continuous since 2020.
articles.heading: What he has been holding

articles.body_md:
Two reliable circles a week, plus the periodic silent retreats. Tuesday at Svarga Loka opens the kirtan stream; Wednesday at Ranakami brings the same stream into language; the Brahma Vihara weekends move the same voice into Buddhist silence three or so times a year. The substrate is continuous even though the venues are distinct — a cell that joins one room often finds itself drawn to the others.

Field readings:

- Kirtan as `(6, RECEIVE / GIVE oscillating)` — hexagonal tiling of voices in resonance.
- Satsang as `(7, GIVE)` — heptadic asymmetric teaching, the giving does not deplete.
- Buddhist-temple silence holding kirtan as `(9, COMPLETE)` — enneadic crossing of two streams (bhakti voice + vipassana quiet) inside one room.

The lineage walks back through Swami Shyam in India, through every voice that ever sang the Names he now sings, and forward through every body the silent retreats have reset. The substrate's `prev_glyph` chain on any of his Tuesday kirtan glyphs is long; the depth-pay for walking it back to the first voice that taught the first name would be substantial. Most listeners pay for the surface and let the depth stay there for those who come back week after week.
articles.heading: How the network reads this

articles.body_md:
Open-air Wantilan on the riverbanks of the Campuhan, about five minutes' walk from central Ubud. Harmonium, voices, the slow build into the names. Visitors and locals seated together on the floor. The hour ends when the room ends; nothing rushes.

Held at [Adiwana Svarga Loka](https://adiwanahotels.com/svargaloka-resort-ubud-bali/). Times shift gently with the seasons; current schedule on the resort's Facebook and Instagram.

*Field reading: `(6, RECEIVE / GIVE oscillating)` — kirtan in its most classical room.*
articles.heading: Kirtan at Svarga Loka

articles.body_md:
90 minutes. A private gathering held with friends. The practice is to bring a question alive in you and let the wisdom of one tradition or another speak into it. Bodies are welcome. Words are welcome. Silence is welcome.

Held at [Ranakami](/people/ilena-young), Jl. Raya Penestanan Kelod no 16, Sayan, Ubud. Free for those who came to Tuesday's kirtan. Free for Indonesian participants always. A 50,000 IDR offering otherwise — given as a gesture toward the field rather than a price for a seat.

Event listing: [tomorrow.cx/gYzKR3](https://tomorrow.cx/event.php?short=gYzKR3)

*Field reading: `(7, GIVE asymmetric)` — heptadic teaching, the giving does not deplete.*
articles.heading: Satsang at Ranakami

articles.body_md:
The largest Buddhist monastery on Bali — [Brahma Vihara Arama](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brahmavihara-Arama), in the village of Banjar Tegeha, Buleleng regency, about 11 km from Lovina on the northern coast — invites Vasudev and [Prof Jem Bendell](https://jembendell.com/) two to three times a year to gather friends for a long weekend.

The format weaves meditative silence with spiritual singing, nature hiking through the surrounding terrain, soaking at the holy hot springs nearby, and a collective satsang. The temple sometimes hosts Dances of Universal Peace as part of the gathering. The retreats have become a nourishing, rebalancing rhythm in the year for locals and long-resident expats; the temple discourages international travelers from flying in for them.

Continuous since 2020. Announcements move through the temple's WhatsApp group; the schedule is also published at [jembendell.com/bali-temple-retreats](https://jembendell.com/bali-temple-retreats/). Donations to the temple are welcomed.

*Field reading: `(9, COMPLETE)` — bhakti voice meeting vipassana silence in one room; a crossing few kirtan-wallahs are invited to make.*
articles.heading: Silent retreat at Brahma Vihara Arama

articles.body_md:
**Studio albums** — each linked directly to its Spotify page:

- [*108 Names*](https://open.spotify.com/artist/6qwErnxVVaPa0gNLpUzbU2) — with Radha Kumari
- [*Mahadevaya*](https://open.spotify.com/artist/7wyGgm0yXGN0Ie3qvv4Gxo) (2013)
- [*Midnight Blossom*](https://open.spotify.com/album/7jayj5e2KhNxxQSfax834R) — instrumental, flute
- [*SUPER DELUXE*](https://open.spotify.com/artist/1QxUNjo3ehTgRAqkgb9xSn) — reggae project, ongoing since 2005
- [*Realms of Beauty*](https://open.spotify.com/album/2ZNRLC6xiM80dMg8cvG7py) — sound healing, with Amma Sophia Rose
- [*Little Star*](https://open.spotify.com/album/617yEUykhgNpEZbaGakbjW)
- [*Estrela Bela*](https://open.spotify.com/album/2xTL3ZP8K5L2OJp7s6BeXx)

**Sopa de Luz** — a kirtan-and-reggae fusion project co-created in Bali during 2020/2021 with musicians who were grounded on the island through the closures of that period. A second register for the bhakti voice.

**Live archive.** Four full Svarga Loka kirtan sets recorded in 2019 are preserved on [Bandcamp under *Jai Ma 108*](https://jaima108.bandcamp.com/) — Vasudev with Maalika (harmonium and backup vocals), Jai James Harvey and Joseph Wallin (drums), Suzanne Solveil (kartals), David Phillips (bass + recording). *In service to sharing the Divine Names.*

**Songbooks.** *Mantras for Bhajan* and *Songs from the Heart* — repertoires gathered in India, at Rainbow Gatherings, and through unscheduled meetings around the world.
articles.heading: Albums, live archive, songbooks

articles.heading: Public anchors

articles.body_md:
Beyond the steady Bali rooms, Vasudev's voice has been heard at gatherings the wider bhakti world organises:

- [BaliSpirit Festival 2019](https://balispiritfestival2019.sched.com/speaker/vasudev_amp_friends.1z9gc0fg) — Vasudev & Friends at Purnati Center for the Arts, Ubud (Mar 25 – Apr 1, 2019)
- [Dubai Kirtan Mela 2025 — Kirtan Rasa](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0_c0id0DbLE) — Vasudev & Keshava, Day 3
- [New Vrindavan 24-Hour Kirtan](https://soundcloud.com/charmcitykirtans/vasudev-new-vrindavan-24hr-kirtan-day-2-61922) — Day 2, June 19, 2022 (via Charm City Kirtans)
- [Capital Kirtan, Day 2](https://soundcloud.com/charmcitykirtans/vasudev-capital-kirtan-day-2-3) — March 11, 2023 (via Charm City Kirtans)
- [New Vrindavan 24-Hour Kirtan](https://soundcloud.com/charmcitykirtans/vasudev-krishna-new-vrindavan-24hr-kirtan-61524) — June 15, 2024
articles.heading: Where the voice has travelled

articles.body_md:
From the other side of the same exchange — the record this body has kept of what arrived through him. Every link is an in-repo source the lineage can be walked back through.

- **2026-05-07 · Wednesday Satsang on pressure.** The circle at Ranakami sat with *what do we do when shit happens*. Five strategies of return surfaced — the observer, naming the need, the gift, hoʻoponopono, and frequency × angle × focus. Seeded into the body as [lc-when-the-pressure-comes](/vision/lc-when-the-pressure-comes).
- **2026-05-09 · The Enneagram mention.** A passing reference in conversation became the door through which the Enneagram entered this body's vocabulary as a contemplative typology — nine specific shapes of essence-loss and return. Seeded as [lc-essence-and-the-nine-costumes](/vision/lc-essence-and-the-nine-costumes). Transmission record: [tx-vasudev-baba-enneagram](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/vision-kb/transmissions/2026-05-09-vasudev-baba-enneagram.md).
- **2026-05-11 · The written essay *On frequency, consciousness and the assemblage point*.** A short essay sent directly to Urs as a Word document. It weaves the three gunas, the seven chakras, Socrates' *Gorgias* and Castaneda's assemblage point as one continuous picture, grounded in HeartMath's heart-field measurements. Confirmed and deepened three concepts the body already held — [lc-assemblage-point](/vision/lc-assemblage-point), [lc-frequency-routes-reception](/vision/lc-frequency-routes-reception), and [lc-essence-and-the-nine-costumes](/vision/lc-essence-and-the-nine-costumes) — and gave the assemblage-point concept a named teacher whose lineage is now walkable. Full text preserved: [tx-vasudev-baba-on-frequency](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/vision-kb/transmissions/2026-05-11-vasudev-baba-on-frequency.md).

The lineage record of how the Ubud cells found each other is held in three further documents — the constellation map, the lived embodied lineage, and the four-day meeting walk:

[Constellation of cells](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/2026-04-29-constellation-of-cells.md) [Ubud embodied lineage](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/ubud-embodied-lineage.md) [Ubud meeting walk](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/lineage/2026-04-29-ubud-meeting-walk.md)
articles.heading: What Vasudev Baba has given the Coherence Network

articles.body_md:
**WhatsApp:** [+62 812-3668-0038](https://wa.me/6281236680038)

Schedule changes, retreat invitations, and personal connection happen most directly through WhatsApp. The two weekly rooms (Tuesday Svarga Loka, Wednesday Ranakami) are reliable; the Brahma Vihara retreats appear two to three times a year; everything else moves through the message thread.
articles.heading: To reach Vasudev Baba

en.footer_md:
**Wider weaving.** Wednesday satsang held at [Ranakami](/people/ilena-young), Ubud. Brahma Vihara silent retreats co-held with [Prof Jem Bendell](https://jembendell.com/). Tuesday kirtan at [Adiwana Svarga Loka](https://adiwanahotels.com/svargaloka-resort-ubud-bali/).

**In-body record of his contributions:** [lc-when-the-pressure-comes](/vision/lc-when-the-pressure-comes) · [lc-essence-and-the-nine-costumes](/vision/lc-essence-and-the-nine-costumes) · [lc-assemblage-point](/vision/lc-assemblage-point) · [lc-frequency-routes-reception](/vision/lc-frequency-routes-reception) · [tx · Enneagram (2026-05-09)](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/vision-kb/transmissions/2026-05-09-vasudev-baba-enneagram.md) · [tx · On Frequency (2026-05-11)](https://github.com/seeker71/Coherence-Network/blob/main/docs/vision-kb/transmissions/2026-05-11-vasudev-baba-on-frequency.md)

**Public anchors:** [Sacred Song Circle](https://www.sacredsongcircle.com/vasudev/) · [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/vasudevmusic/) · [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8hccm_A1lEjVZkJuPqKEAA) · [Facebook group](https://www.facebook.com/groups/123972024418527/) · [Bandcamp](https://jaima108.bandcamp.com/) · [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/6qwErnxVVaPa0gNLpUzbU2) · [Apple Music](https://music.apple.com/us/artist/vasudev/388604645) · [Brahma Vihara retreats](https://jembendell.com/bali-temple-retreats/) · [BaliSpirit 2019](https://balispiritfestival2019.sched.com/speaker/vasudev_amp_friends.1z9gc0fg) · [Dubai Kirtan Mela 2025](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0_c0id0DbLE)

*This profile is a welcoming scaffold; Vasudev Baba is invited to replace any part of it with his own words at any time.*
